# Resource Library

The searchable resource library for the [Talent Sourcing Command Center](../README.md) — the tools and resources sourcers and recruiters actually use 🕵️‍♀️, from AI sourcing platforms and OSINT to talent intelligence, outreach, and the people worth learning from.

This started as a personal collection of scattered bookmarks and grew into a public resource for the whole community. We hope you find it useful!

This is a work in progress and open source — if something is wrong or you want to add something, please read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md).

*Note: not everything here was discovered firsthand. Tools and resources are added after surfacing on Product Hunt, blogs, in the recruiting/sourcing community, and at conferences.*

#### See this?

💰 = no free or freemium version

❤️ = apps that I personally use A LOT and consider my favourites

## 🚀 Start Here

New to sourcing, or building your stack from scratch? Start with these. One battle-tested pick per job to be done — everything here is either free or has a usable free tier, except where marked 💰.

- **Find people** — [LinkedIn Recruiter](https://business.linkedin.com/talent-solutions/recruiter) 💰 if you have budget; [RecruitEm](https://recruitin.net) for free Google X-ray search.
- **Build boolean strings** — [Balazs Boolean Builder](https://bit.ly/balazs_boolean) for free LinkedIn search.
- **Get contact info** — [Hunter.io](https://hunter.io) (great free tier) or [ContactOut](https://contactout.com) 💰 for LinkedIn coverage.
- **Reach out** — [SourceWhale](https://sourcewhale.com) 💰 for multi-channel sequences, or [Lemlist](https://lemlist.com) 💰 for cold email.
- **Enrich & automate** — [Clay](https://clay.com) pulls candidate data from 50+ sources into one workflow.
- **Write better job posts** — [Textio](https://textio.com) 💰 predicts how your language lands with candidates.
- **Know the market** — [Levels.fyi](https://levels.fyi) for comp and [Layoffs.fyi](https://layoffs.fyi) for golden-window sourcing.
- **Think & draft** — [Claude](https://claude.ai) for outreach, playbooks, boolean, and analysis.
- **Practice** — [Sourcing Games](http://sourcing.games) to sharpen OSINT and boolean skills.
- **Stay current** — [Recruiting Brainfood](https://recruitingbrainfood.com), the essential weekly newsletter by Hung Lee.

---

## 📊 Reports & Research

### Annual Benchmarks

- [Gem Recruiting Benchmarks Report](https://www.gem.com/resource/recruiting-benchmarks) — ❤️ The definitive annual benchmark. 165M applicants, 15M candidates, 1.2M hires analyzed. Source of hire breakdown, funnel passthrough rates, recruiter productivity. 2026 edition available.
- [GRID Talent Trends Report (2026)](https://www.bullhorn.com/grid/2026-industry-trends/report/) — Annual staffing industry research. AI adoption, candidate behavior, firm performance benchmarks. Published by Bullhorn.
- [HR.com Future of Talent Acquisition 2025](https://hr.com/en/resources/research_library/future-of-talent-acquisition-2025) — AI adoption in TA, hiring strategy transformation, operational priorities.
- [iHire State of Online Recruiting](https://ihire.com/resourcecenter) — AI adoption in recruiting jumped 428% between 2023-2025. Annual benchmarks on recruiter behavior and candidate job search patterns.
- [LinkedIn Future of Recruiting](https://business.linkedin.com/talent-solutions/resources/future-of-recruiting) — ❤️ Annual report on recruiter trends, AI adoption, and skills-based hiring shifts.
- [ManpowerGroup Talent Shortage Survey (2026)](https://www.manpowergroup.com) — 72% of employers worldwide can't find the talent they need. 39,000+ employers across 41 countries. Essential demand signal for any sourcing strategy.
- [SHRM Talent Trends Report](https://www.shrm.org/topics-tools/research) — Annual survey on recruiting challenges, AI adoption rates, and HR priorities.

### Sourcing & Talent Intelligence

- [Aptitude Research: Demystifying Talent Intelligence (2023)](https://www.aptituderesearch.com) — 72% of companies increasing TI investment. Skills-based approach, vendor landscape, business impact.
- [Aptitude Research: State of Sourcing (2023)](https://www.aptituderesearch.com) — 75% of companies are not satisfied with their sourcing approach. AI adoption, sourcing tech landscape, ROI measurement. By Madeline Laurano.
- [Aptitude Research: TA Systems Index (2021)](https://www.aptituderesearch.com) — ATS vendor profiles, top 10 TA tech trends, key drivers. Full competitive landscape snapshot.
- [Aspect43 TA Market Landscape (2025)](https://aspect43.com) — In-depth analysis of the evolving TA tech landscape. Vendor categories, adoption patterns.
- [ATAP Sourcing Metrics Standard](https://atapglobal.org) — ATAP's sourcing metrics framework. Sourcing workflow, KPI definitions, measurement standards.
- [CEB: How to Measure Sourcing Effectiveness](https://gartner.com) — Metrics for demonstrating business value and measuring individual and team performance. Available via Gartner for HR subscription.
- [Lightcast: Talent Intelligence (2024)](https://lightcast.io/resources) — Internal + external data intersection. Skills taxonomy, job posting analytics, workforce planning framework.
- [Sourcing Metrics Whitepaper — Balazs Paroczay (2023)](https://thesourcecode.academy) — ❤️ Cracking the code on sourcing metrics. By Balazs Paroczay and Alexandra Gyetvai. Source Code Agency.

### Candidate Experience

- [2024: What Sets CandE Award Winners Apart](https://survale.com/candes) — Contentment down, resentment up. What separates award-winning candidate experience from the rest.
- [CandE Benchmark Research (Survale)](https://survale.com/candes) — Annual candidate experience research. North America + Global editions. NPS, perception gaps, business impact.
- [The 2024 Business Impact of Candidate Experience](https://survale.com/candes) — ROI of candidate experience investment. Post-pandemic volatility, relationship quality, global benchmarks.

### Guides & Playbooks

- [Avature Drip Campaigns Playbook](https://avature.net/resources) — 5 types of drip campaigns for recruiting. CRM nurture, passive candidate sequencing, buy-in framework.
- [Greenhouse: How to Build a Talent Operation](https://www.greenhouse.com/guidance) — Recruiting funnel, hiring manager partnership, structured process. The strategic recruiter playbook.
- [Karat 2025-2026 AI Workforce Transformation Report](https://karat.com) — Engineering interview trends. How AI is changing technical skill assessment. Data from 400+ engineering leaders.
- [McKinsey: Beyond the Hype — AI in TMT (2024)](https://mckinsey.com/industries/technology-media-and-telecommunications) — AI and gen AI in tech, media, telecom. Essential context for tech talent sourcing.
- [Phenom Essential TA Toolkit](https://phenom.com/resources) — Candidate persona canvas, journey map, 7 email templates for recruiters.
- [RAISE: Direct Sourcing Playbook](https://raiserecruitinggroup.com) — Employer brand-led sourcing, talent pool curation, self-sourcing vs managed direct sourcing.
- [Standard Recruiting Analytics Package](https://ere.net) — Five standard reports + three scorecards. 20-point report card framework for corporate recruiting programs.
- [Talent Leader's Guide to Reporting](https://www.gem.com/resources) — Mastering recruitment metrics. Analytics, reporting, TA team performance measurement.
- [WorkTech Global Market Briefing (2025)](https://worktechresearch.com) — $3.55B in HR tech deals in H1 2025. Agentic AI, payroll, and recruitment platforms identified as hot investment categories. By George LaRoque.

## 📚 Books & Reading Library

### Recruiting Fundamentals

- [Digitizing Talent](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Jessica Miller-Merrell* — Creative strategies for the digital recruiting age. By the founder of Workology.
- [Evergreen Talent](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Roberta Chinsky Matuson* — A guide to hiring and cultivating a sustainable workforce.
- [Evidence-Based Recruiting](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Atta Tarki* — Systematic and repeatable hiring practices based on data, not gut instinct.
- [Fire Your Hiring Habits](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *John Mitchell* — Innovating the ways you hire, develop, and retain talent in the modern workforce.
- [Full Stack Recruiter: New Secrets Revealed](https://fullstackrecruiter.net) — 💰 *Jan Tegze* — Sequel with hidden tactics for top recruiters and sourcers.
- [Full Stack Recruiter: The Modern Recruiter's Guide](https://fullstackrecruiter.net) — 💰 ❤️ *Jan Tegze* — The bible. Covers sourcing, boolean, tools, outreach, and the full recruiting lifecycle.
- [Hiring for Attitude](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Mark Murphy* — Recruiting for attitude and cultural fit alongside skills. Includes assessment methodology.
- [Hiring for Diversity](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Arthur Woods & Susanna Tharakan* — Building inclusive and equitable hiring practices. Practical guide with tools.
- [Hiring Greatness](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *David E. Perry & Mark J. Haluska* — How to recruit your dream team and outcompete for top talent.
- [Recruiting Sucks...But It Doesn't Have To](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Steve Lowisz* — Breaking through the myths holding recruiting back.
- [Talent Magnet](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Mark Miller* — How to attract and keep the best people.
- [The Holloway Guide to Technical Recruiting](https://holloway.com/g/technical-recruiting-hiring/about) — ❤️ *Holloway* — Free comprehensive guide to hiring engineers. Deeply practical.
- [The Professional Recruiter's Handbook](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Jane Newell Brown & Ann Swain* — Delivering excellence in recruitment practice. Classic UK-origin reference.
- [The Robot-Proof Recruiter (2nd ed.)](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Katrina Collier* — Human-centered recruiting in an AI world. Updated edition with new AI chapter.
- [The Talent Fix Vol. 2](https://shrm.org/store) — 💰 *Tim Sackett (2024)* — SHRM guide to recruiting great talent. TA tech stack, high-volume hiring, recruiter leadership.
- [Who Is the New How](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Justin Palmer & Jessica Schertz* — Strategies to find, recruit, and create the best teams.
- [Who: The A Method for Hiring](https://whothebook.com) — 💰 ❤️ *Geoff Smart & Randy Street* — Scorecard-based hiring methodology. The most widely used structured interviewing framework.

### Sourcing, Search & OSINT

- [300 Best Boolean Strings](https://booleanbook.com) — 💰 ❤️ *Irina Shamaeva* — Boolean string bible.
- [80 Sourcing Hacks](https://therecruitmentnetwork.com) — *The Recruitment Network* — 80 practical sourcing hacks for recruiters. Quick-reference format.
- [AI Talent Sourcing](https://wizardsourcer.com) — 💰 ❤️ *Jonathan Kidder (2023)* — 500+ ChatGPT prompts for recruiting tasks. Boolean, outreach, JDs, metrics, DEI.
- [Guide to Recruiting Military Veterans](https://wizardsourcer.com) — 💰 *Jonathan Kidder* — Boolean strings, communities, and tools to find and recruit veterans online.
- [High Tech and High Touch: Headhunting](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Coverdill & Finlay* — Technology and economic transformation in headhunting and executive search.
- [Open Source Intelligence Techniques](https://inteltechniques.com/book1.html) — 💰 ❤️ *Michael Bazzell* — The OSINT bible. Resources for searching and analyzing online information — updated annually.
- [People as Merchandise: Crack the Code to LinkedIn Recruitment](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Josef Kadlec* — Deep LinkedIn sourcing methodology. By a SourceCon legend.
- [Power Searching the Internet: The Librarian's Quick Guide](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Nicole Hennig* — Advanced web search techniques. Librarian methodology applied to sourcing.
- [Talk Tech to Me](https://amazon.com) — 💰 ❤️ *Brian Fink* — The non-technical guide to technology recruiting. Understand what engineers actually build.
- [The Joy of Search](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Daniel M. Russell* — Google insider's guide to going beyond the basics.
- [The Sourcer's Playbook](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Geoff Peterson* — Visual guide for finding talent online. Sourcing strategies, platforms, workflows.
- [Top Talent Sourcing Tools for Recruiters](https://wizardsourcer.com) — 💰 *Jonathan Kidder* — Beginner's guide to 50+ sourcing tools. Platforms, extensions, boolean, OSINT — all covered.

### AIRS Certification Materials

- [AIRS AdvancedLab 2.0 Certification Course](https://airsdirectory.com) — 💰 *AIRS* — The classic AIRS certification course content. Boolean, X-ray, sourcing methodology fundamentals.
- [AIRS: Discovering Candidate Contact Information](https://airsdirectory.com) — 💰 *AIRS* — Finding contact info for candidates. AIRS methodology for contact research.

### AI & Talent Technology

- [AI iQ for a Human-Focused Future](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Seth Dobrin* — AI strategy, talent, and culture. Human-first AI implementation.
- [Artificial Intelligence for HR (2nd ed.)](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Ben Eubanks* — Use AI to support and develop a successful workforce. Updated edition.
- [Data-Driven HR (2nd ed.)](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Bernard Marr* — How to use AI, analytics, and data to drive HR performance.
- [Decoding Talent](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Eric Sydell* — How AI and big data can solve your company's people puzzle.
- [Life 3.0: Being Human in the Age of AI](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Max Tegmark* — The long view on AI's impact on society and work.
- [Talent Intelligence](https://amazon.com) — 💰 ❤️ *Toby Culshaw* — Using business and people data to drive organizational performance. By one of the field's defining practitioners.
- [Weapons of Math Destruction](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Cathy O'Neil* — How big data increases inequality. Critical counterbalance when evaluating AI hiring tools.

### Metrics & Analytics

- [Quantifiably Better: HR Analytics](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Steve Vanwieren* — Delivering HR analytics from start to finish. Practical framework for TA measurement.
- [Superforecasting](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Tetlock & Gardner* — The art and science of prediction. Useful for structured hiring decisions and pipeline forecasting.
- [The HR Scorecard](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Becker, Huselid & Ulrich* — Linking people, strategy, and performance. Classic HR measurement framework.

### Talent Strategy & People Ops

- [Agile People](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Pia-Maria Thoren* — Radical HR approach that leads to motivated employees.
- [Good to Great](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Jim Collins* — Why some companies make the leap and others don't. First Who, then What — talent is central.
- [People Strategy](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Jack Altman* — How to invest in people and make culture your competitive advantage.
- [Scaling Up Excellence](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Sutton & Rao* — Getting to more without settling for less. How to scale people and culture.
- [Superbosses](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Sydney Finkelstein* — How exceptional leaders master the flow of talent in their organizations.
- [Talent Relationship Management](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Armin Trost* — Competitive recruiting strategies in times of talent shortage.
- [The Death of Best Practices](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Susan P. Chen* — Reimagining HR through cultivating a growth mindset.
- [Victory Through Organization](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Dave Ulrich et al.* — Why the war for talent is failing and what to do about it.
- [Work Rules!](https://amazon.com) — 💰 ❤️ *Laszlo Bock* — Insights from inside Google. The people ops bible — how data-driven hiring actually works.

### Diversity, Equity & Inclusion

- [Athena Rising: Why Men Should Mentor Women](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Johnson & Smith* — Practical guide to cross-gender mentorship in the workplace.
- [Good Guys: Better Allies for Women in the Workplace](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Smith & Johnson* — How men can be better allies for women in the workplace.
- [Indivisible](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Denise Hamilton* — How to forge our differences into a stronger future.
- [Rebel Ideas: The Power of Diverse Thinking](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Matthew Syed* — Cognitive diversity as competitive advantage. Evidence-based case for inclusive hiring.
- [The Culture Map](https://amazon.com) — 💰 ❤️ *Erin Meyer* — Decoding how people think and work across cultures. Essential for global recruiting teams.

### Leadership & Negotiation

- [An Elegant Puzzle: Systems of Engineering Management](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Will Larson* — Great context for anyone sourcing engineering leaders.
- [Grit: The Power of Passion and Perseverance](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Angela Duckworth* — The science of success. Useful lens for evaluating candidates beyond credentials.
- [Never Split the Difference](https://amazon.com) — 💰 ❤️ *Chris Voss* — FBI negotiation tactics applied to everyday life. Invaluable for offer negotiations.
- [No Hard Feelings](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Fosslien & West Duffy* — The secret power of embracing emotions at work.
- [Radical Candor](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Kim Scott* — Be a kickass boss without losing your humanity. Manager/leader essential.
- [Reset: How to Change What's Not Working](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Dan Heath* — Framework for identifying and fixing broken systems. Useful for TA ops redesign.
- [The Manager's Path](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Camille Fournier* — Guide for tech leaders navigating growth and change. Essential context for technical recruiting.
- [What Got You Here Won't Get You There](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Marshall Goldsmith* — 20 workplace habits successful people need to break.

### Tech Context for Recruiters

- [A Hacker's Mind](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Bruce Schneier* — How the powerful bend society's rules. Systems thinking for sourcers.
- [Bad Blood](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *John Carreyrou* — Theranos story. Cautionary tale about culture, hiring, and leadership failure.
- [Employer Branding for Competitive Advantage](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Rana, Agarwal & Sharma* — Models and implementation strategies for employer branding programs.
- [Fabless Semiconductor Manufacturing](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Chinmay K. Maiti* — In the era of IoT. Context for anyone sourcing chip design and semiconductor talent.
- [Palo Alto: A History of California, Capitalism, and the World](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Malcolm Harris* — Critical history of Silicon Valley. Useful context for tech talent markets.
- [Talk Tech to Me](https://amazon.com) — 💰 ❤️ *Brian Fink* — The non-technical guide to technology recruiting. Understand what engineers actually do.
- [The Innovators](https://amazon.com) — 💰 *Walter Isaacson* — How hackers, geniuses, and geeks created the digital revolution. Context for tech recruiting.

---

## 🤖 AI Sourcing Platforms

- [AmazingHiring](https://amazinghiring.com) — 💰 Chrome extension + platform for tech sourcing. Aggregates 50+ professional networks including GitHub, Stack Overflow, and patent databases.
- [Apollo.io](https://apollo.io) — 💰 Sales intelligence + contact database. 270M+ contacts, sequences. Strong for sourcing outside LinkedIn.
- [Covey Scout](https://getcovey.com) — 💰 AI sourcing assistant you train in plain language. Describe how you'd evaluate a candidate; Scout builds and runs the bot. Inbound screening reviews thousands of profiles to surface top 5% within an hour.
- [Eightfold AI](https://eightfold.ai) — 💰 Talent intelligence platform. Skills-based matching, internal mobility, DEI sourcing signals. 2B+ talent profiles. Fortune 500 standard.
- [Fetcher](https://fetcher.ai) — 💰 AI identifies and scores candidates; a human curation team validates the shortlist before delivery. Hybrid model for teams that want automation without fully unreviewed AI output.
- [Findem](https://findem.ai) — 💰 Attribute-based talent search. Finds candidates keyword search misses. Strong diversity and career-signal enrichment.
- [Gem](https://gem.com) — 💰 All-in-one recruiting platform: ATS + CRM + AI sourcing + analytics. AI sourcing agent searches 800M+ profiles with full candidate history context. Now publicly traded.
- [GoPerfect](https://goperfect.com) — 💰 Autonomous AI sourcing. Scans 800M+ profiles, scores candidates, delivers shortlists. 60+ ATS integrations via Merge. Good for recurring role types at scale.
- [HeroHunt.ai](https://herohunt.ai) — 💰 AI recruiter that searches 1B+ profiles across LinkedIn, GitHub, and Stack Overflow, then runs autopilot outreach. RecruitGPT natural-language search + contextual screening.
- [hireEZ](https://hireez.com) — ❤️ 💰 AI-powered outbound recruiting platform. Cross-platform candidate search, outreach sequences, Workday integration.
- [Hireflow](https://www.hireflow.com) — 💰 Chrome extension sourcing + email drip campaigns + ATS sync. Treats recruiting like outbound sales.
- [Juicebox (PeopleGPT)](https://juicebox.ai) — 💰 Natural language candidate search. 800M+ profiles, relationship tracking, AI outreach, 50+ ATS integrations. Conversational search launched late 2025.
- [Kula](https://kula.ai) — 💰 Outbound recruiting platform. Sequences, referral automation, ATS sync. Built specifically for sourcing-led teams.
- [LinkedIn Hiring Assistant](https://www.linkedin.com/business/talent/blog/talent-acquisition/linkedin-hiring-assistant) — 💰 LinkedIn's first agentic AI product (launched Oct 2024, globally available 2025). Takes intake, builds qualified pipelines, reviews applicants, and answers candidate questions. Learns recruiter preferences over time.
- [LinkedIn Recruiter](https://business.linkedin.com/talent-solutions/recruiter) — ❤️ 💰 The industry standard. 1B+ profiles, InMail, advanced filters. Generative AI search enhancements launched 2025.
- [Loxo](https://loxo.co) — 💰 Talent intelligence OS. CRM + sourcing + outreach in one. Good for agency and in-house teams.
- [Mercor](https://mercor.com) — AI-powered hiring marketplace. Candidates complete an AI interview once; high scorers receive automated Instant Offers across future roles. Strong for sourcing pre-vetted global technical talent.
- [Moonhub](https://moonhub.ai) — AI sourcing via natural language. Surfaces candidates keyword search misses across public web data. Founded by Nancy Xu.
- [Pin](https://pin.com) — Full-stack AI recruiting: sourcing, outreach, screening, scheduling in one. 850M+ profiles, 48% avg reply rate, transparent pricing from $100/mo with a free tier. Strong for teams that want to replace 5 tools with one.
- [SeekOut](https://seekout.com) — 💰 Enterprise talent intelligence. Strong diversity filters, GitHub/patent enrichment, large database. Unmatched for DEI and hard-to-fill technical roles.
- [Tezi (Max)](https://tezi.ai) — Autonomous AI recruiter. "Max" runs end-to-end — sourcing, screening, and scheduling — as a hands-off agent. For teams that want to delegate full req ownership to AI.
- [Turing](https://turing.com) — 💰 Pre-vetted remote engineers matched via AI. 3M+ global developers on talent cloud, AI vetting across 100+ tech skills. Two-week risk-free trial. Good for building remote engineering teams quickly.
- [ZoomInfo Talent](https://zoominfo.com) — 💰 B2B data + recruiting. Company org charts, direct dials, intent signals. Best combined with another sourcing platform.

---

## 🔍 Search & OSINT

#### Boolean & Sourcing Tools

- [40 Custom Search Engines by Irina Shamaeva](https://booleanstrings.com/all-the-40-forty-custom-search-engines) — Curated custom search engines for sourcing.
- [Balazs Boolean Builder](https://bit.ly/balazs_boolean) — ❤️ Boolean builder for free LinkedIn. By Balazs Paroczay.
- [BooleanStrings Bank](https://scoperac.com/booleanstringbank) — String directory maintained by sourcing community.
- [CSE Utopia](https://start.me/p/EL84Km/cse-utopia) — ❤️ Amazing list of public CSEs by Dean Da Costa.
- [Free People Search Tool](https://freepeoplesearchtool.com) — Search candidates across LinkedIn, GitHub, Twitter, Dribbble.
- [Grep.app](https://grep.app) — Search across all public GitHub repos by code. Find developers by what they build.
- [I Search From](http://isearchfrom.com) — Simulate Google search from a different location and device.
- [Intelligence X](https://intelx.io) — OSINT search engine. Indexes dark web, leaked data, public archives.
- [RecruitEm](https://recruitin.net) — ❤️ Free Google X-ray search generator. Build boolean strings for LinkedIn, X, GitHub, Stack Overflow, and XING — paste a JD and let AI build the search.
- [SourceGraph](https://sourcegraph.com/search) — Universal code search across GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket.
- [Sourcing Games](http://sourcing.games) — ❤️ Gamified sourcing challenges to sharpen OSINT and boolean skills.
- [Wayback Machine](https://archive.org/web) — Find old versions of profiles, company pages, removed content.

#### Social Media Search

- [Answer The Public](https://answerthepublic.com) — Surface questions people search — useful for JD keywords and EVP research.
- [Followerwonk](https://followerwonk.com) — Twitter/X bio search. Find people by keywords in bios.
- [Searchmybio](https://www.searchmy.bio) — Search Instagram user bios.
- [Social Searcher](https://social-searcher.com) — Free social media search across platforms.
- [WhoPostedWhat](https://whopostedwhat.com) — Date-based Facebook post search. By Henk van Ess.

#### GitHub & Developer Search

- [LinkedIn Sales Nav Email Lookup](https://www.linkedin.com/sales/gmail/profile/viewByEmail/PUTEMAILHERE) — ❤️ Replace the end of the URL with any email to find a connected LinkedIn profile.
- [OctoHR](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/beiklbdjdmfkgchmiabjejdlpaoicbef) — GitHub Chrome extension showing recruiter-friendly profile details.
- [Profile Summary for GitHub](https://profile-summary-for-github.com/search) — Visual summary of any GitHub profile.

---

## ☎️ Contact Info & Enrichment

- [Anymail Finder](https://anymailfinder.com) — 💰 Verified email finder. Only charges for verified results.
- [Apollo.io](https://apollo.io) — 💰 270M+ contacts, email sequences, enrichment.
- [Clay](https://clay.com) — ❤️ 💰 Data enrichment + workflow automation. Pulls from 50+ sources.
- [Clearbit](https://clearbit.com) — B2B data enrichment. Company + person data via API. Now part of HubSpot — free tier via HubSpot.
- [ContactOut](https://contactout.com) — ❤️ 💰 Email + phone finder. Strong LinkedIn coverage.
- [Datagma](https://datagma.com) — 💰 GDPR-compliant email + phone finder. Strong European coverage. Pay-per-result model.
- [Hunter.io](https://hunter.io) — ❤️ Domain-based email search and verification. Great free tier.
- [Kaspr](https://kaspr.io) — 💰 LinkedIn email + phone finder. ~500M verified contacts, strong European coverage. Free plan with unlimited B2B email credits.
- [Lusha](https://lusha.com) — 💰 B2B contact data. Good direct dial coverage.
- [Nymeria](https://nymeria.io) — 💰 Email finder with LinkedIn integration.
- [RocketReach](https://rocketreach.co) — 💰 Email and phone finder. Large database, API available.
- [SalesQL](https://salesql.com) — 💰 LinkedIn email + phone finder extension.
- [Signal Hire](https://signalhire.com) — 💰 Email + phone finder with Chrome extension.
- [Swordfish AI](https://swordfish.ai) — 💰 Direct dials and mobile numbers. Strong phone coverage.
- [Wiza](https://wiza.co) — 💰 Verified emails + phone numbers from LinkedIn and Sales Navigator. Bulk export, real-time verification, job-change alerts. Free tier available.

---

## 📫 Outreach & Email

#### Sequencing & Automation

- [Boomerang for Gmail](https://boomeranggmail.com) — Email scheduling and reminders.
- [Chatkick (formerly Trinsly)](https://chatkick.com) — 💰 Talent CRM + personalized email automation for recruiters. Trinsly rebranded to Chatkick.
- [Dripify](https://dripify.com) — 💰 LinkedIn automation for sequences and drip campaigns.
- [Expandi](https://expandi.io) — 💰 Safe LinkedIn automation. Mimics human behavior.
- [GMass](https://gmass.co) — Mail-merge and cold email sequences right inside Gmail. Generous free tier for solo recruiters.
- [Instantly.ai](https://instantly.ai) — 💰 Cold email at scale. Unlimited sending accounts, warm-up built in. Fast becoming the default for high-volume outreach.
- [Lemlist](https://lemlist.com) — 💰 Personalized cold email with images and video. High deliverability focus.
- [MixMax](https://mixmax.com) — ❤️ 💰 Gmail enhancement. Sequences, scheduling, tracking, templates.
- [Smartlead](https://smartlead.ai) — 💰 Multi-channel cold outreach (email + LinkedIn). Strong deliverability infrastructure. Popular for sourcing-as-sales workflows.
- [SourceWhale](https://sourcewhale.com) — ❤️ 💰 Multi-step outreach across email, LinkedIn, SMS, WhatsApp, and phone. AI drafting, pipeline insights, 70+ ATS/CRM integrations. Built for recruiting teams.
- [Waalaxy](https://waalaxy.com) — 💰 LinkedIn + email outreach sequences. Great for sourcers.

#### Email Utilities

- [Deepl Translator](https://deepl.com/translator) — ❤️ Best-in-class AI translation. Better than Google Translate.
- [Email Subject Line Tester](https://sendcheckit.com/email-subject-line-tester) — Score and improve your subject lines.
- [Grammarly](https://grammarly.com) — ❤️ Grammar, tone, and clarity check. Essential writing tool.
- [Hemingway Editor](http://hemingwayapp.com) — Readability check. Paste any outreach message here first.
- [Mailinator](https://mailinator.com) — ❤️ Disposable email inboxes for one-time signups.
- [Temp-Mail](https://temp-mail.org) — Free throwaway email.

---

## 📈 Talent Intelligence

- [Draup](https://draup.com) — 💰 AI-powered talent intelligence. Market mapping, skills data, competitor analysis, and location/workforce planning. Strong for strategic sourcing and workforce design.
- [Google Trends](https://trends.google.com) — Search volume trends. Useful for role and skills demand signals.
- [Horsefly Analytics](https://horseflyanalytics.com) — 💰 Labor market analytics. Real-time, localized supply/demand and cost insights for talent acquisition and location strategy.
- [Indeed Hiring Lab](https://www.hiringlab.org) — ❤️ Indeed's economic research arm. Labor market data, job posting trends, and wage analysis. (Replaced Indeed's retired Job Trends tool.)
- [Layoffs.fyi](https://layoffs.fyi) — ❤️ Track tech layoffs in real time. Golden window sourcing.
- [Levels.fyi](https://levels.fyi) — ❤️ Crowdsourced compensation at tech companies. Extremely accurate.
- [Lightcast (EMSI Burning Glass)](https://lightcast.io) — 💰 Labor market data. Job postings, skills demand, compensation.
- [LinkedIn Talent Insights](https://business.linkedin.com/talent-solutions/talent-insights) — ❤️ 💰 Workforce analytics. Pool sizing, competitor mapping, skills trends.
- [Pave](https://pave.com) — 💰 Real-time compensation benchmarking.
- [People Data Labs](https://www.peopledatalabs.com) — 💰 Person and company data via API. Raw building block for custom talent-mapping and enrichment workflows.
- [Progression.fyi](https://progression.fyi) — Open source career frameworks from top tech companies.
- [Ravio](https://ravio.com) — European compensation data. Free if you contribute your data.
- [Revelio Labs](https://reveliolabs.com) — 💰 Workforce intelligence from public employment data.
- [TalentNeuron](https://talentneuron.com) — 💰 Global talent intelligence. Real-time labor market data.
- [TechPays](https://techpays.com) — Open source European tech compensation.
- [U.S. Semiconductor Ecosystem Map (SIA)](https://semiconductors.org/ecosystem) — R&D, chip design, fabrication, and supplier locations across the US. Essential for semiconductor talent sourcing.

---

## 🗂️ ATS, CRM & Recruiting Ops

#### ATS

- [Ashby](https://ashbyhq.com) — 💰 Modern ATS with strong analytics built in. One of the fastest-growing tools in TA ops — particularly popular with tech companies.
- [Greenhouse](https://www.greenhouse.com) — 💰 Structured hiring + ATS. Strong integrations ecosystem.
- [Lever](https://lever.co) — 💰 ATS + CRM combined. Nurture + pipeline management. Part of Employ alongside JazzHR, Jobvite, and Pillar.
- [Manatal](https://manatal.com) — 💰 ATS + AI recommendations from $15/user/month. Good entry-level option for smaller or agency teams.
- [Pinpoint](https://pinpointhq.com) — 💰 ATS + talent CRM with strong candidate experience and reporting. Popular with mid-market in-house teams.
- [Rippling](https://rippling.com) — 💰 HR + ATS + payroll + IT in one platform. Good for teams consolidating their HR stack.
- [SmartRecruiters (now SAP)](https://smartrecruiters.com) — 💰 AI-enabled ATS acquired by SAP (September 2025). High-volume recruiting, strong automation, good candidate experience. 4,000+ enterprise orgs. Will replace SuccessFactors Recruiting over 3-5 years.
- [Teamtailor](https://teamtailor.com) — 💰 ATS with strong employer branding and career site tools. Popular in EMEA.
- [Workable](https://workable.com) — 💰 SMB-friendly ATS with built-in sourcing, AI recommendations, and video interviews.
- [Workday Recruiting](https://workday.com) — 💰 Enterprise ATS. Widely used at large orgs.

#### CRM & Talent Marketing

- [Avature](https://avature.net) — 💰 Enterprise CRM with heavy customization. Fortune 500 standard.
- [Beamery](https://beamery.com) — 💰 Talent CRM + lifecycle platform. AI-personalized outreach, career site, interview self-scheduling. Nurture passive pipelines at scale.
- [Gem](https://gem.com) — 💰 All-in-one ATS + CRM + sourcing. Strong analytics. Now public.
- [Phenom](https://phenom.com) — 💰 Talent experience platform. CRM, career site, internal mobility, AI throughout.

---

## 🙋 Job Descriptions & Inclusive Hiring

- [Adaface JD Generator](https://www.adaface.com/job-description-generator) — Free templates to easily create job descriptions for popular tech roles.
- [BeApplied](https://textanalysis.beapplied.com) — JD text analysis for bias.
- [Datapeople](https://datapeople.io) — 💰 Job description analytics and inclusive-writing guidance. Data-driven recommendations to reduce bias and widen candidate pools.
- [Gender Decoder](http://gender-decoder.katmatfield.com) — ❤️ Check JDs for gendered language.
- [Joblint](http://joblint.org) — Flag toxic, unrealistic, or discriminatory language in JDs.
- [Jobpage Grader](https://jobpagegrader.com) — Grade your job pages for candidate experience.
- [Ongig](https://www.ongig.com) — 💰 Job description software with a 10,000+ biased-word database, inclusive replacements, readability tips, and JD templates.
- [Textio](https://textio.com) — ❤️ 💰 Augmented writing for JDs. Predicts impact of language on candidate pools.

---

## 🗣 Screening & Interviews

#### AI Screening & Conversational Recruiting

- [HeyMilo](https://www.heymilo.ai) — 💰 AI voice screening. Two-way conversational voice interviews that screen and rank candidates automatically. Good for phone-screen-heavy pipelines.
- [HireVue](https://hirevue.com) — 💰 Video interviews + AI assessments. Enterprise scale. Masks PII during screening to reduce bias.
- [Humanly](https://humanly.io) — 💰 Conversational AI recruiter + talent CRM. Automates screening, scheduling, and structured interviews. Hires up to 8x faster for high-volume pipelines. Strong consent and data governance framework.
- [Paradox (Olivia)](https://paradox.ai) — 💰 Conversational AI for high-volume hiring. Screens, schedules, and engages candidates via text/SMS/WhatsApp 24/7. Acquired by Workday (September 2025). Best for retail, hospitality, and logistics at scale.
- [Sapia.ai](https://sapia.ai) — 💰 Text-based AI interviewing. Structured chat interviews that screen and rank candidates fairly at scale. Good for high-volume without the chatbot feel.

#### Interview Intelligence

- [BrightHire](https://brighthire.com) — 💰 Records, transcribes, and highlights every interview. Structured guides, shared feedback, AI screening interviews. Reduces reliance on interviewer memory. Integrates with major ATS and video platforms.
- [Grain](https://grain.com) — Record, transcribe, and clip meeting highlights. Good for sharing interview moments with hiring managers.
- [Metaview](https://metaview.ai) — 💰 AI interview notes. Auto-generates structured summaries in the background — no behavior change needed.
- [Otter.ai](https://otter.ai) — Meeting transcription and notes. Good free entry point for interview notetaking.
- [Pillar → Employ](https://www.employinc.com) — 💰 Interview intelligence with scorecard completion, interviewer coaching, and first-year attrition tracking. Acquired by Employ in 2025; now integrated into Lever/Jobvite/JazzHR ecosystem.
- [Screenloop](https://screenloop.com) — 💰 AI-native hiring intelligence platform. Interview capture, structured feedback, bias reduction, recruiter analytics, and funnel optimization in one.

#### Technical Interviews

- [BarRaiser](https://barraiser.com) — 💰 AI-powered interview intelligence + structured interview training. Focuses on consistency and bias reduction across hiring panels.
- [CodeInterview](https://codeinterview.io) — Browser-based live coding interviews. Lightweight collaborative IDE for take-homes and pair-programming screens.
- [CoderPad](https://coderpad.io) — ❤️ Real-time collaborative coding interviews in 40+ languages. The go-to live-coding tool for engineering panels.
- [CodeSignal](https://codesignal.com) — 💰 Skills-based technical assessments + live interviewing. Standardized scoring, strong anti-cheating, popular for engineering at scale.
- [Codility](https://codility.com) — 💰 Technical coding assessments with detailed skill reporting.
- [HackerRank](https://hackerrank.com) — Coding challenges and assessments. Free tier available.
- [Karat](https://karat.com) — 💰 Human-led, AI-enabled technical interviews as a service. Standardizes engineering interviews. "NextGen Interviews" launched December 2025. Used by Meta, Lyft, and others to reduce interviewer burden.

#### Interview Scheduling

- [Calendly](https://calendly.com) — ❤️ Scheduling tool. Share link, candidates pick a time. Free tier works for most individual recruiters.
- [GoodTime](https://goodtime.io) — 💰 AI-powered interview scheduling. Automates up to 90% of coordination. Panel scheduling, interviewer load balancing, self-booking, reminders via email/SMS/WhatsApp.
- [Loom](https://loom.com) — ❤️ Screen + webcam recording. Async video comms and candidate outreach.
- [ModernLoop](https://www.modernloop.io) — 💰 Interview scheduling and coordination for complex panels. Load balancing, interviewer training tracking, and ATS sync.
- [Prelude (Calendly)](https://www.prelude.co) — 💰 Recruiting-specific scheduling: round-robin assignment, panel coordination, and native Greenhouse connectivity. Acquired by Calendly.
- [Spark Hire](https://sparkhire.com) — 💰 One-way and live video interviews.
- [Vidyard](https://vidyard.com) — Personalized video for outreach and screening.

#### Assessments & Reference

- [Awesome Interview Questions (GitHub)](https://github.com/DopplerHQ/awesome-interview-questions) — Repo with interview guides for devs.
- [SkillSurvey (now iCIMS)](https://www.icims.com/products/skillsurvey/) — 💰 Automated reference checks with benchmarking. Acquired by iCIMS.
- [Workable Interview Question Templates](https://resources.workable.com/interview-questions) — 500+ interview question templates by role.
- [Xref Template Builder](https://template-builder.xref.com) — Free reference check question template builder.
- [Zinc Reference Generator](https://zincwork.com) — Free culture-fit reference question generator.

---

## 🐿 Scraping & Automation

- [Apify](https://apify.com) — Web scraping + automation platform. 1500+ pre-built actors.
- [Bardeen](https://bardeen.ai) — Browser automation for repetitive sourcing tasks.
- [Browse AI](https://www.browse.ai) — No-code scraper that extracts structured data from web pages on a schedule. Good for lightweight monitoring and list extraction into sheets.
- [Captain Data](https://www.captaindata.com) — 💰 No-code data extraction + enrichment across LinkedIn and 100+ sources. Chain scraping, enrichment, and CRM push into automated workflows.
- [Clay](https://clay.com) — ❤️ 💰 Data enrichment + workflow automation hub. Pulls from 50+ sources. Best in class.
- [Instant Data Scraper](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/ofaokhiedipichpaobibbnahnkdoiiah) — Chrome extension to scrape tables from any webpage.
- [Make](https://make.com) — Visual workflow automation. Great for recruiting ops.
- [n8n](https://n8n.io) — Open-source workflow automation. Self-hostable.
- [Phantombuster](https://phantombuster.com) — ❤️ 💰 Automation agents for LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram.
- [Scrapy](https://scrapy.org) — Python web scraping framework.
- [Zapier](https://zapier.com) — App automation. Connect ATS, Slack, email, sheets.

---

## ✨ AI Writing & Productivity

- [ChatGPT](https://chatgpt.com) — General purpose AI assistant. Great for drafts, ideation, and quick research.
- [Claude (Anthropic)](https://claude.ai) — ❤️ Best for long-form drafting, analysis, strategy docs, playbooks, and complex prompting. Handles nuanced recruiting tasks well.
- [Copy.ai](https://copy.ai) — AI copywriting for JDs, outreach, and employer brand content.
- [Gamma.app](https://gamma.app) — AI-generated presentations and docs. Fast stakeholder decks.
- [Gemini (Google)](https://gemini.google.com) — Google's AI assistant. Strong for research, long context, and tight Google Workspace integration.
- [Glasp](https://glasp.co) — Free web + PDF highlighter and summarizer. Good for building sourcing research workflows.
- [NotebookLM (Google)](https://notebooklm.google.com) — Upload sources and get grounded, cited answers + audio overviews. Great for digesting market reports and research.
- [Notion AI](https://notion.so) — 💰 Writing assistant inside Notion. Good for playbooks and team docs.
- [Perplexity AI](https://perplexity.ai) — AI search with citations. Great for real-time market intel and sourcing research.
- [Textio Loop](https://textio.com) — 💰 On-brand job postings and candidate outreach copy. Predicts language impact on candidate pools.

---

## 📣 Employer Brand & Job Marketing

- [Big List of Places to Post Jobs (Global)](https://recruitingbrainfood.com/big-list-of-places-to-post-jobs-globally) — Comprehensive global job posting list by Hung Lee.
- [Canva](https://canva.com) — ❤️ Design tool. Fastest way to create employer brand assets.
- [Doodle Ipsum](https://doodleipsum.com) — Free custom illustrations for design work.
- [Flaticon](https://flaticon.com) — Free vector icons.
- [Jobboard Finder](https://jobboardfinder.com/search) — A search engine to find niche job boards globally.
- [Lempod](https://lempod.com) — 💰 Growth hacking tool to increase traction on LinkedIn posts.
- [Pexels](https://pexels.com) — Free stock photos.
- [Remove.bg](https://remove.bg) — AI background remover for photos.
- [Simple Icons](https://simpleicons.org) — Free SVG brand icons — useful for tech stack visuals in JDs.
- [Undraw](https://undraw.co) — ❤️ Free open-source illustrations. Use in JDs, career sites.
- [Unsplash](https://unsplash.com) — Free stock photos.

---

## 🛠️ Productivity & Browser Tools

#### Must-Have Extensions

- [Bulk URL Opener](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/hgenngnjgfkdggambccohomebieocekm) — Open multiple URLs in bulk.
- [Extensity](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/extensity/jjmflmamggggndanpgfnpelongoepncg) — ❤️ Quickly enable/disable Chrome extensions. Essential for managing a large stack.
- [Highlight This](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/fgmbnmjmbjenlhbefngfibmjkpbcljaj) — Find and highlight keywords on any webpage.
- [Hypothesis](https://hypothes.is) — Collaboratively annotate and highlight web pages and PDFs.
- [Linkclump](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/lfpjkncokllnfokkgpkobnkbkmelfefj) — ❤️ Open/copy multiple links at once.
- [OneTab](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/onetab/chphlpgkkbolifaimnlloiipkdnihall) — Collapse all tabs into a list. Saves up to 95% memory.
- [Text Blaze](https://blaze.today) — ❤️ Text snippet expansion. Speed up repetitive typing.
- [Toggl Track](https://toggl.com) — ❤️ Time tracking. Know where your sourcing hours actually go.
- [uBlock Origin](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/cjpalhdlnbpafiamejdnhcphjbkeiagm) — ❤️ Best ad + tracker blocker. Speeds up every page.

#### Dev & Data Tools

- [JSON to CSV](https://konklone.io/json/) — Convert JSON to CSV instantly.
- [JSONView](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/chklaanhfefbnpoihckbnefhakgolnmc) — Format JSON in browser.
- [Online Regex Tester](https://regex101.com) — Build and test regex patterns.
- [Postman](https://postman.com) — API testing and exploration tool.
- [Public APIs List](https://public-apis.xyz) — Directory of free public APIs.
- [VS Code](https://code.visualstudio.com) — Lightweight code/text editor. Replaced Atom/Sublime.
- [WhatRuns](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/cmkdbmfndkfgebldhnkbfhlneefdaaip) — See what tech stack a website runs on.

#### Scheduling & Meetings

- [Calendly](https://calendly.com) — ❤️ Scheduling tool. Share link, candidates pick a time.
- [Grain](https://grain.com) — Record, transcribe, and clip meeting highlights.
- [Krisp](https://krisp.ai) — Background noise removal for calls.
- [Otter.ai](https://otter.ai) — Meeting transcription and notes.

#### Productivity

- [Momentum](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/momentum/laookkfknpbbblfpciffpaejjkokdgca) — Personal dashboard designed to eliminate distraction.
- [My Time Zone](https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/fdmjemdmpmohggbjhmbeoipmheemmcpm) — Automatic timezone conversion for scheduling.
- [Raycast](https://www.raycast.com) — ❤️ Mac launcher + productivity hub. Snippets, clipboard history, window management, and AI in one keystroke.

## 🔎 Search Engines & Reference

- [Google](https://www.google.com)
  - [Google Dataset Search](https://toolbox.google.com/datasetsearch)
  - [Google Patents](https://patents.google.com/)
  - [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com)
  - [Google Trends](https://trends.google.com/trends/)
- [Bing](https://www.bing.com/)
- [DuckDuckGo](https://duckduckgo.com/)
- [Open Corporates](https://opencorporates.com/) — Largest open database of companies in the world.
- [Research Gate](https://www.researchgate.net/) — Find researchers and publications.
- [Semantic Scholar](https://www.semanticscholar.org/) — AI-powered academic search.
- [Wayback Machine](https://archive.org/web/) — Find old versions of anything.
- [World Bank Open Data](https://data.worldbank.org/) — Free and open access to global development data.

## 📓 Learning & Community

#### Newsletters & Blogs

- [AmazingHiring Blog](https://amazinghiring.com/blog/) — Sourcing tips and market insights.
- [BooleanStrings](http://booleanstrings.com) — Blog by Irina Shamaeva. Deep sourcing and boolean content.
- [Dr. John Sullivan](https://drjohnsullivan.com) — Data-driven recruiting strategy. Hiring manager alignment, metrics, recruiting ROI.
- [GlossaryTech](https://blog.glossarytech.com) — Tech glossary for non-technical recruiters.
- [Katrina Collier](https://www.katrinacollier.com) — Writing and resources on candidate engagement and human-centered hiring in an AI world.
- [Recruiting Brainfood](https://recruitingbrainfood.com) — ❤️ Weekly newsletter by Hung Lee. Essential reading.
- [Recruiting Toolbox](https://recruitingtools.com) — Tools and resources for TA practitioners.
- [RecruitingDaily](https://recruitingdaily.com) — TA news, podcasts, and tools.
- [SocialTalent Blog](https://socialtalent.com/blog) — Recruiter training and content.
- [SourceCon](https://sourcecon.com) — ❤️ Sourcing conference + blog. Original content and hackathons. (Now part of ERE.)
- [Talent Edge Weekly](https://talentedgeweekly.com) — Curated weekly roundup of recruiting and TA insights. Good signal-to-noise.
- [WizardSourcer](https://wizardsourcer.com/blog) — Practical sourcing tutorials by Jonathan Kidder.

#### Audio

- [Big List of Recruiting / HR Podcasts](https://recruitingbrainfood.com/big-list-of-podcasts/) — Comprehensive podcast list by Hung Lee.
- [Hiring on All Cylinders](http://hiringonallcylinders.com) — Recruiting strategy podcast.
- [Recruiting Future with Matt Alder](https://recruitingfuture.com) — ❤️ The most-listened-to TA podcast. Future of recruiting, AI, and hiring innovation. Weekly interviews with practitioners and researchers.
- [Talk Talent to Me](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/talk-talent-to-me/id1288771792) — TA strategy conversations with practitioners. (Now sponsored by LHH; still going.)
- [The Chad & Cheese Podcast](https://chadcheese.com) — HRtech commentary, sometimes irreverent.
- [The Sourcing School](https://thesourcingschool.com) — Sourcing-focused podcast by Maisha Cannon and Jeremy Roberts. Tactics, tools, and guest sourcers.

#### Video

- [Dean Da Costa](https://www.youtube.com/user/star4343/videos) — Sourcing tools deep dives.
- [Glen Cathey](https://www.youtube.com/c/GlenCathey) — Sourcing pioneer. AI in sourcing, boolean, and talent strategy.
- [Jan Tegze](https://www.youtube.com/@JanTegze) — Full Stack Recruiter author. Practical Google/sourcing tutorials.
- [Josef Kadlec](https://www.youtube.com/user/josefkadlec/videos) — Tech sourcing tutorials.
- [ohsusannamarie](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCMENmamzULqh7WHzNRdd0dQ/videos) — ❤️ Sourcing tutorials and tips by Susanna Frazier.
- [Recruiting Future](https://www.youtube.com/@RecruitingFuture) — Video edition of Matt Alder's podcast.
- [Sourcers Who Code](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLh9V7buk0vuDxX9G_acEyuZ4VVMa7b51v) — ❤️ Technical sourcing video series.

#### Communities

- [ATAP](https://atapglobal.org) — Association of Talent Acquisition Professionals.
- [Big List of Online Recruiting Communities](https://recruitingbrainfood.com/big-list-of-online-recruiter-communities) — Comprehensive list by Hung Lee.
- [Secret Sourcing Group (Facebook)](https://facebook.com/groups/secret.sourcing) — Practitioner discussions on sourcing.
- [SourceCon (Facebook)](https://facebook.com/groups/151466298380729) — SourceCon community group.
- [Sourcers Who Code (Facebook)](https://facebook.com/groups/SourcersWhoCode) — Active community for tech-savvy sourcers.

#### Who to Follow

The people whose posts are worth turning on notifications for. Most active on LinkedIn.

- [Glen Cathey](https://www.linkedin.com/in/glencathey) — ❤️ The "Sourcing Sensei." Deep, thoughtful takes on AI in sourcing and the future of TA.
- [Hung Lee](https://recruitingbrainfood.com) — Curator of Recruiting Brainfood and the field's best-connected aggregator of what matters this week.
- [Irina Shamaeva](https://www.linkedin.com/in/irinashamaeva) — ❤️ Boolean and X-ray queen. Endless practical sourcing tips.
- [Jan Tegze](https://www.youtube.com/@JanTegze) — Full Stack Recruiter author. Tools, tactics, and sourcing experiments.
- [Jonathan Kidder](https://wizardsourcer.com) — WizardSourcer. Tutorials, tool reviews, and "sourcers to follow" lists.
- [Katrina Collier](https://www.katrinacollier.com) — Candidate engagement and the human side of hiring.
- [Maisha Cannon](https://www.linkedin.com/in/maishac) — The Sourcing School. Practical sourcing and community-building.

#### Conferences & Events

Where the community gathers. (IRL = in person, Virtual = online, Hybrid = both.)

- [ERE Recruiting Innovation Summit](https://www.ere.net) — IRL — Premier event for in-house TA leaders and strategists. Home of SourceCon sessions.
- [HR Technology Conference](https://www.hrtechnologyconference.com) — IRL — The biggest HR/recruiting tech expo. See every tool on this list under one roof.
- [LinkedIn Talent Connect](https://www.linkedin.com/talent/talent-connect) — Hybrid — LinkedIn's flagship TA event. Product launches and big-picture trends.
- [RecFest](https://www.recfest.com) — IRL — ❤️ Festival-style recruiting conference. UK (Knebworth) + USA (Nashville) editions. Deep sourcing, employer brand, and modern workflows.
- [SourceCon](https://www.sourcecon.com) — Hybrid — ❤️ The sourcing conference. Hackathons, boolean deep dives, OSINT. Now run under ERE.
- [Sourcing Summit (SOSU)](https://sourcingsummit.com) — Hybrid — Global sourcing conference series (Europe, APAC, and online editions).
- [Talent Acquisition Week](https://talentacquisitionweek.com) — IRL — Three co-located conferences: Talent Sourcing Strategies, Social Recruiting Strategies, and Employer Branding.
- [Talent42](https://talent42.com) — Hybrid — ❤️ The only conference built specifically for technical recruiting. In-person + virtual.
- [UNLEASH](https://www.unleash.ai) — IRL — Future-of-work, AI, and HR innovation. America + World editions.

#### Cool Lists by Cool People

- [Bellingcat's Online Investigation Toolkit](https://bellingcat.gitbook.io/toolkit) — OSINT toolkit from investigative journalists. (Current GitBook edition — the old Google Doc was retired.)
- [Big List of Places to Post Jobs (Global)](https://www.recruitingbrainfood.com/big-list-of-places-to-post-jobs-globally/) — By Hung Lee.
- [CSE Utopia](https://start.me/p/EL84Km/cse-utopia) — Amazing list of public CSEs by Dean Da Costa.
- [SSaR](https://start.me/p/GE7Ebm/ssar) — Huge tools list by Dean Da Costa.

---

## 🌍 Relocation, Compensation & Research

- [CB Insights](https://www.cbinsights.com/) — Company research, funding data, market maps.
- [Levels.fyi](https://levels.fyi) — ❤️ Crowdsourced compensation at tech companies.
- [Numbeo](http://www.numbeo.com/cost-of-living/) — Calculate the cost of living by city.
- [Open Corporates](https://opencorporates.com/) — Largest open database of companies globally.
- [Payscale](https://www.payscale.com) — Salary data by role, location, and experience.
- [Progression.fyi](https://progression.fyi) — Open source career frameworks.
- [Ravio](https://ravio.com) — Real-time European compensation insights.
- [Relocate.me](http://relocate.me/) — Job board for people who want to relocate.
- [Salary.com](http://salary.com/) — Compensation data and benchmarking.
- [TechPays](https://techpays.com) — Open source compensation info for European tech roles.
- [Travelscope](https://www.markuslerner.com/travelscope/) — Worldwide Visa check.

---

*Using any of these resources is at your own risk. Most are not mine, and if they were I wouldn't tell you. I am not responsible for your safety / compliancy / relationship / dogs & cats or anything else. Unless you hire some great people after you found this list, in that case you need to buy me pretty stuff. OKTHXBYE xoxo*
